description:
Add opt-in Foxy Mode toggle (default off) that renders launched tools as browser-style tabs inside the launcher. Permanent Home tab, closeable tool tabs, no native window embedding. Full spec and implementation plan in .story/tickets/T-001-foxy-mode-v1.md.

Files: main.js (readConfig, cove:config:get, cove:config:setPreferences, cove:launch hide-skip), renderer/index.html (tab strip, tool-session container, Settings checkbox, CSS), renderer/assets/launcher.js (state extension, tab helpers, doLaunch/doUninstall hooks, init wiring).
title: Foxy Mode v1: browser-style tool tabs
